title: Login Issue
description: Customer cannot log in to the platform using correct credentials.

title: Payment Failed
description: Payment failed while checking out with credit card.

title: Unable to Update Profile
description: Profile information does not save after editing.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer requests a dark mode option for the platform.

title: Bug in Report Generation
description: Generated reports show incorrect data for last month.

title: Account Suspension
description: Customer's account was suspended without notice.

title: Password Reset Not Working
description: Password reset link expired before customer could use it.

title: Email Notifications Delay
description: Customer receives email notifications after several hours.

title: App Crash on Startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer charged double for last month's subscription.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer cannot receive 2FA code via SMS.

title: Slow Page Load
description: Dashboard pages take more than 15 seconds to load.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Download button for invoices is not responsive.

title: Chat Support Not Responding
description: Customer cannot get response via live chat support.

title: UI Overlaps on Mobile
description: Buttons overlap on mobile devices in profile section.
